items.caption: A book cover with a sepia-toned photograph in the background depicting a dramatic scene of explosions and smoke, suggesting a war scenario. the title "pearl harbor" is prominently displayed in large, bold, black letters at the top of the cover. below the title, there is a subtitle in smaller black text that reads "the attack that pushed the us to battle." the bottom of the cover features additional text in black that states "history book war | children's history," indicating the book's genre and intended audience. the overall style of the image is historical and evocative, designed to attract the attention of readers interested in children's history books about significant historical events.
